title: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 Out for Class 10th on the official website - megresults.nic.in on 22-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MBOSE SSLC result.

content.text: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 has been officially released by the Meghalaya Board of School Education for Class 10th students who appeared in the supplementary examination. The result is now available online for the academic session 2026.

MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://megresults.nic.in/. Students can check and download their Class 10th supplementary results by entering their roll number and required login credentials. It is advised that students carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result and contact the board authorities in case of any discrepancies.

sections.heading: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: MBOSE has declared the Class 10th SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 on its official result portal. Students can access their marks online and download their provisional marksheet using their login credentials.

sections.heading: MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The Meghalaya Board has activated the direct link to check the SSLC Supplementary Result 2026 for Class 10th students. Candidates can easily access and download their results through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check MBOSE SSLC Supplementary Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check your Class 10th supplementary result online:

items: Click on the link for SSLC Supplementary Result 2026.
Enter your roll number in the required field.
Your result will appear on the screen.
Download and print the result for future reference.

seo_tags: MBOSE result will be out today
